title: Open Source First
description: We believe in the power of open source. Our platform is built to serve the open source community.

title: Data Quality
description: Every dataset entry is carefully structured and validated. Quality over quantity, always.

title: Developer Experience
description: Clean APIs, intuitive interfaces, and comprehensive documentation. We build tools we'd want to use.

title: Continuous Innovation
description: The code landscape evolves fast. We evolve with it, constantly adding new repositories and features.
